zpFix "for x in f.xreadlines()" -> "for x in f".
This fixer will also convert g(f.xreadlines) into g(f.__iter__).
fixer_base)
Namec
FixXreadlinesTz
    power< call=any+ trailer< '.' 'xreadlines' > trailer< '(' ')' > >
    |
    power< any+ trailer< '.' no_call='xreadlines' > >
    c
no_call
__iter__)
prefixc
clone)
4/usr/lib64/python3.9/lib2to3/fixes/fix_xreadlines.py
